text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! The perfect drink after a perfect patrol!
Excellent choice, me!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Nothing beats a sports drink after sweating
a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You know, I didn't know your Bakushin Patrols
were so long! You just kept going and going! It
was so cool!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For my patrol to truly protect the student body, it
must last twenty-four seven, three hundred
sixty-five days a year!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Why me, you might ask? Because it is my duty as
a genius to protect the peace!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Does that mean... you're the school's hero?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Class representative by day, school hero by
night... The Masked Representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I LIKE IT! The perfect title for one such as I!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I am the Masked Representative—Bakushin Red!
And in order to eradicate evil... I shall do another
patrol! BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa! Lemme help, Bakushin Red! Special
Move: Super Patrol Daaash!
